summary: Set 068 Session 6 of 6 (FINAL): Synthesis + docs + release + dogfood + close. Ran on claude-opus-4-8 high (operator launched opus; the S5 routed next-orch rec was claude-sonnet-4-6/medium). This session EXECUTES the S4 routed-DEMOTE cut-over the transition guard deferred (the S5 contract-test floor is now live, so the cut-over may land) and ships the ai_router 0.22.0 PyPI release carrying the whole of Set 068. SHIPPED CODE: ai_router/routed_gate.py (+ 27 tests in test_routed_gate.py) -- the per-session routed-verification GATING PREDICATE. evaluate_routed_gate(changed_paths, *, contract_uncovered, high_blast, post_failed_loop, breadth_threshold) returns a RoutedGateDecision(required, triggers, reasons, files, modules). It builds ON TOP of blast_radius.classify_paths (the Set 066 P_set=any(P_task) core cross-artifact/schema/wiring/index predicate) and ADDS the session-level triggers the S4 decision (routed-fate-decision.md section 3) named: multi-module span (>=2 distinct top-level module roots), diff breadth (>= breadth_threshold=4 distinct files), build/CI/config surface (.github/workflows, pyproject.toml, router-config.yaml(.yml/.local), package.json/-lock, setup.*, tox.ini, dockerfile, tsconfig, esbuild, .eslintrc, .pre-commit-config, ci/release/test yml), and the three operator overrides (contract_uncovered / high_blast / post_failed_loop) that can ONLY RAISE the verdict to REQUIRED, never lower it. It is DETERMINISTIC and biased-toward-review (the S4 consensus's load-bearing requirement: a programmatic diff heuristic, not a per-session feeling). Exported from __init__.py. CLI python -m ai_router.routed_gate: exit 0 = REQUIRED, 10 = SKIP, --json exits 0. THE CUT-OVER (the demotion is now LIVE): docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md Step 6 flipped from MANDATORY to GATED (run the predicate on the session diff; run the routed call only when it trips; log the verdict either way) + the Verification-surface policy subsection's transition guard CLEARED + the ASCII diagram updated; ai_router/router-config.yaml verification: anchor flipped (transition-guarded -> CUT OVER S6) + a live routed_gate sub-block (enabled: true, breadth_threshold: 4). SYNTHESIS: docs/verification-surface-strategy.md -- the canonical settled strategy tying Experiment A + the symmetric re-grade + Experiment B + the DEMOTE decision + the contract-test gate into one layered model (contract-test floor -> path-aware ceiling -> gated routed), settling all five Set 065 questions (a path-aware shipped, b DEMOTE-cut-over, c automated producer shipped, d contract-gate shipped, open one-predicate-three-applications); a Superseded pointer added atop the Set 065 proposal. DOCS: ai_router/docs/close-out.md documents the contract-test gate in the content-aware gate list; ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md 'What Set 068 added' replaces the old 'deferred to Set 068'. RELEASE: pyproject.toml 0.21.1 -> 0.22.0; ai_router/CHANGELOG.md 0.22.0 entry (Added: run_test cage, contract gate, routed_gate; Changed: per-session routed DEMOTED to gated + grep ReDoS relocated; Docs). Operator pushes tag v0.22.0 on a green-Test SHA (I commit, operator tags -- operator-confirmed split). DOGFOOD (pathAwareCritique=required): adversarial-critique-prompt.md whole-set prompt prepared for the operator's manual GPT-5.4+Gemini-Pro run, AND this set's own path-aware-critique.json produced via the automated producer (operator-confirmed BOTH). VERIFICATION: cross-provider via gpt-5-4 (different provider than the opus orchestrator; per-session routed REQUIRED because S6's own diff trips the new predicate -- multi-module + blast-radius + breadth + build-config; up-front conventions block per L-064-10). R1 FAIL 2 findings (build-ci-config under-covered the repo config surface -- relied on blast_radius INDEX to rescue router-config.yaml; and 3 tests didn't prove what they name) -> both FIXED (added the config signals directly + a regression test; strengthened the override-raise-only / exact-trigger-order / reason-per-trigger tests) -> R2 PASS clean. DOGFOOD (operator-confirmed BOTH the automated producer AND the manual prompt): ran python -m ai_router.pull_critique over the repo-root sandbox, google + openai (>=2 distinct providers); GPT converged under the now-shipped budget-aware forced verdict (no over-probe avoidance needed -- the adapter's caps + forced verdict own that, not the orchestrator). The dogfood caught a REAL release bug the per-session routed verification missed: ai_router/__init__.py __version__ was stale at 0.20.0 (never bumped through 0.21.x) while pyproject + CHANGELOG say 0.22.0 -> FIXED to 0.22.0; plus 2 Minors folded (pull-verifier.md default-sandbox doc precision; a routed_gate breadth_threshold<1 guard + test, fails-safe). An initial scoped-to-ai_router producer run produced 2 false positives (wrong path prefixes + 'docs missing') BECAUSE the narrowed sandbox hid docs/ -- a concrete cost of constraining the sandbox; the final artifact was RE-RUN over the full repo-root sandbox (legitimate fresh production, not an edit of a written artifact) so the saved path-aware-critique.json is the honest full-context critique. Full-sandbox dogfood result: google VERIFIED; openai ISSUES_FOUND 2 Majors -> (#1, REAL, L-065-1) the workflow doc still asserted mandatory per-session verification OUTSIDE the updated Step 6 (the Session-definition bullet line ~247 + the Cross-Provider-Verification concept opener line ~272) -- both FIXED to the gated framing in one global pass (grep confirmed line ~2401 is the separate route() auto-verify mechanism, correctly unchanged); (#2, moot) it flagged that the on-disk artifact contained repository-false findings -- that was the SCOPED run's artifact GPT read mid-run, since replaced by this full-sandbox run whose findings are real/meta, not false. path_aware_critique close-out gate validates OK (2 distinct providers, identity-matched). L-067-1 refined: the budget-aware forced verdict shipped (Set 068 S1), GPT now converges, and over-probe control belongs to the adapter (caps + forced verdict + skip-failed-arm) -- do NOT hand-pick providers or narrow the sandbox to dodge it (operator correction, encoded). Full ai_router pytest suite GREEN: 1668 passed / 1 pre-existing skip (baseline 1641 + 27). Metered ~$0.476 (verify R1 $0.292 + R2 $0.181 + next-set rec $0.003) + the dogfood producer runs. NO Marketplace/extension change (spec non-goal: no UI this set). Next-SET recommendation routed in next-set-rec.md: Set 069 -- instrument the gated verification surface (telemetry to reopen RETIRE).
